codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. Created meta_cognitive.rs module with TaskType enum, ModelPerformance, PromptingStrategy, SqliteMetaCognitiveStore, and get_recommendation API. 25 unit tests pass. Two minor dead code warnings exist but are non-blocking.

issues.description: Dead code: `_task_types_str` is constructed but never used. The variable is prefixed with underscore suggesting intentional documentation of the computation, but it serves no purpose.
Parameter `task_description` in `get_recommendation` is unused (prefixed with underscore in implementation). The recommendation logic does not leverage the task description for contextual reasoning.

summary: Feature mem-meta-cognitive passes review. Implementation provides model performance tracking, prompting strategy storage, and recommendation engine per requirements. Worker followed Rust skill procedure correctly. All 25 tests pass, build succeeds, clippy passes. Two minor dead code warnings (unused variable, unused parameter) are non-blocking.
